title: Field projection for issue show
description:
Add field projection to `issue show` so agents stop piping `--json` through jq/python for single fields (the dominant friction in the session mining).

## Success Criteria

- [ ] `jit issue show <id> --field <name>` prints the named top-level field as plain text.
- [ ] `jit issue show <id> --fields a,b` prints those fields as compact JSON.
- [ ] `jit issue show <id1> <id2> --json` returns a JSON array of issue objects.
